Complete your profile to start bidding

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before placing your first bid.

items.q: Is it free to create an account?
items.a: Yes, creating an account on Loqta Zone is completely free. You only pay when you win an auction.
Promo codes are distributed to registered members via email, WhatsApp, and social media. They reduce your entry fee or unlock bidding advantages for specific auction sessions.
We accept all major Egyptian payment methods including Visa, Mastercard, Vodafone Cash, and bank transfers for secure and seamless transactions.

items.q: How quickly will I receive my order?
items.a: Winning items are typically delivered within 2–5 business days anywhere in Egypt. All deliveries are tracked and fully insured.

items.q: What happens if I win but can't pay?
items.a: We encourage all bidders to bid responsibly. If payment isn't completed within the specified window, the win may be forfeited and your account may be restricted.

items.q: Can I participate in multiple auctions at once?
items.a: Absolutely. You can register and bid in as many simultaneous auctions as you like, giving you more chances to win premium products.

cta.description: Create your free account today and start bidding on premium products. Your first win could be just one bid away.

hero.subtitle: We set out to make premium online auctions fair, exciting, and accessible to everyone in Egypt — one bid at a time.

platform.description: A dynamic online auction platform designed to connect buyers with unique products and exciting deals.

accessible.label: Accessibility
accessible.title: Accessible
accessible.body: A seamless experience allowing users to bid anytime, from anywhere. Whether you're at home or on the move, every auction is always within reach — designed to remove barriers and put opportunity in your hands.

fair.label: Transparency
fair.title: Fair
fair.body: A transparent environment where every participant has an equal opportunity to win. We believe great deals should be earned, not gamed — so every bid is visible, every rule is clear, and every outcome is verified.

engaging.label: Experience
engaging.title: Engaging
engaging.body: Connecting users to valuable items through a competitive, interactive process. We've designed every moment of the auction — the countdown, the bid, the win — to feel electric, rewarding, and worth coming back for.

problem.description: Before Loqta Zone, online auctions in Egypt were riddled with friction. We identified three core failures and built our platform to solve each one.

transparency.label: Transparency
transparency.title: Lack of Transparency
transparency.body: Users often face opaque processes and hidden fees in traditional auctions. Bids disappear without explanation, costs surface at checkout, and the rules shift without warning — leaving buyers frustrated and distrustful.

trust.label: Trust
trust.title: Trust Issues
trust.body: Frequent concerns regarding transaction security, product authenticity, and platform reliability. When a buyer cannot verify what they are winning or whether their payment is safe, confidence collapses entirely.

static.label: Experience
static.title: Static Experience
static.body: Standard e-commerce lacks the engagement, thrill, and competitive spirit of a live event. Browsing a fixed-price catalogue offers no tension, no reward for patience, and no story worth sharing.

solution.description: Every friction point we identified became a design decision. Here is how Loqta Zone answers each challenge with intention.

transparency.label: Principle One
transparency.title: Transparency First
transparency.body: A clear, open bidding environment where rules are defined and fairness is prioritized above all else. Every bid is visible, every fee is stated upfront, and every outcome is verified and publicly confirmed — no surprises, no small print.

gamified.label: Principle Two
gamified.title: Gamified Commerce
gamified.teaser: The thrill of live competition, digitised.
gamified.body: Bringing the excitement of live auctions to the digital space, allowing users to watch competition unfold instantly. Countdown timers, live bid feeds, and real-time notifications turn every session into an event worth staying awake for.

smarter.label: Principle Three
smarter.title: Smarter Buying
smarter.teaser: Confidence at every step of the bid.
smarter.body: Empowering users to secure bargains and legitimate deals with total confidence. Verified sellers, authenticated products, and a structured dispute process mean you always know exactly what you are winning and what you are paying.

features.description: Four pillars that define how Loqta Zone works — and why it works better than anything that came before it.

realtime.label: Feature One
realtime.title: Real-Time Bidding
realtime.body: Participate in live auctions where competition happens instantly. Every bid, every counter-bid, every countdown second is rendered in real time — no refresh, no delay, no uncertainty about where you stand.

secure.label: Feature Two
secure.title: Secure Transactions
secure.body: Built with modern technology to ensure safety, reliability, and customer satisfaction. End-to-end encrypted payments, verified identities, and an escrow-style settlement process protect every single transaction.

variety.label: Feature Three
variety.title: Wide Variety
variety.body: A diverse catalogue of products ranging from tech to fashion, beauty to collectibles. Every lot is curated for quality and demand — so you are always bidding on something genuinely worth winning.

design.label: Feature Four
design.title: User-Centred Design
design.body: An intuitive interface ensuring easy navigation and a smooth bidding process. Designed from the ground up around the needs of real bidders — not feature checklists — so the platform feels effortless at every step.

vm.visionHeading: To Lead the Digital Auction Space
vm.visionBody: To become a leading digital auction marketplace where users enjoy the thrill of bidding while accessing genuine products at competitive prices.
vm.missionBody: To provide a reliable, engaging, and secure auction environment that empowers users to buy smarter and sell easier — with confidence at every step.

whyChoose.description: Four pillars that set us apart — hover each one to discover what makes every bid on Loqta Zone worth placing.

thrill.label: Reason One
thrill.title: For the Thrill
thrill.body: Experience the adrenaline of live competition and the electric rush of winning. Every countdown tick is designed to keep you on the edge — because the best moments deserve real tension.

value.label: Reason Two
value.title: For the Value
value.body: Access unbeatable prices on genuine products. Our curated auction model cuts through inflated retail margins so every session delivers real savings on items truly worth winning.

trust.label: Reason Three
trust.title: For the Trust
trust.body: Clear rules, verified sellers, authenticated products and transparent outcomes. We've removed every reason for doubt — so you bid with confidence from the first moment to the last.

convenience.label: Reason Four
convenience.title: For the Convenience
convenience.body: Buy smarter and easier from anywhere in the world. Seamless mobile-first design, secure payments, and fast nationwide delivery put every deal exactly where it belongs — in your hands.

intro.heading: Please Read Before Joining Any Auction
intro.subtitle: By accessing or using Loqta Zone, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions. Read them carefully before participating in any auction.

agreement.title: Acknowledgement
agreement.checkboxLabel: I have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. I acknowledge that each bid I place is a legally binding commitment to purchase.
agreement.btnPending: Please Accept the Terms to Continue
agreement.hint: You must accept the Terms and Conditions before participating in any auction.

items.def: The owner and operator of the auction website and services.
Any person who registers or participates in auctions on the platform.
A process where users place bids to purchase items listed by Loqta Zone.
The user who places the highest valid bid at the end of an auction.

items: All items listed on Loqta Zone are listed and managed directly by the website administration.
Users cannot list items or sell products through the platform.
Loqta Zone acts as the auctioneer and seller of the listed items.

content.text: To participate in auctions, you must meet the following requirements:

items: You must be 16 years or older.
You must register with accurate personal information.
You must maintain the security of your account credentials.
Loqta Zone reserves the right to verify identity and suspend accounts if suspicious activity is detected.

content.text: 4.1 Item Listings
All auction items are:

items: Listed by the Loqta Zone administration.
Described to the best of the platform's knowledge.
Accompanied by images and specifications where available.

content.text: Loqta Zone reserves the right to modify auction details, remove items, or cancel auctions if necessary.
4.2 Bidding

items: Each bid submitted is legally binding.
Bidders may not retract bids once placed.
Users must ensure they have the ability to complete payment before placing a bid.
The platform may use automatic bid increments.

content.text: 4.3 Auction Completion
At the end of the auction:

items: The highest bid wins.
The winning bidder will receive a payment notification.
Failure to complete payment within the specified timeframe may result in auction cancellation, account suspension, or future bidding restrictions.

content.text: The winning bidder must complete payment within 24–48 hours of auction completion.
Accepted payment methods include:

items: Credit or debit cards.
Online payment gateways.
Digital wallets.
Other payment options supported by Loqta Zone.

content.text: Failure to complete payment may lead to account penalties including suspension and bidding restrictions.
After payment confirmation:

items: Loqta Zone will arrange shipment or delivery of the item.
Delivery times may vary depending on location and logistics providers.
Shipping costs may be added unless otherwise stated in the auction listing.

content.text: Items listed on Loqta Zone may be sold in one of the following conditions, which will be clearly stated in each listing:

items: New
Used
Refurbished
Clearance

content.text: All items are sold as described in the auction listing. Please review all details carefully before bidding.
Users must not engage in any of the following prohibited activities:

items: Manipulate or interfere with auctions in any way.
Place fake or fraudulent bids.
Attempt to interfere with platform operations or infrastructure.
Use automated tools, scripts, or bots to place bids.

content.text: Violations may result in immediate account suspension or permanent ban from the platform.
Loqta Zone reserves the right to cancel or repeat auctions in cases including:

items: Technical errors affecting the auction.
Listing mistakes or incorrect item information.
Detection of fraudulent activity.
System malfunctions or unexpected outages.

content.text: Loqta Zone will make reasonable efforts to ensure accurate listings and fair auctions.
However, the platform shall not be liable for indirect or consequential losses resulting from the use of the website.

All content on the website — including the logo, branding, images, and website design — is the exclusive property of Loqta Zone and may not be reproduced, modified, or used without prior written permission.
Loqta Zone reserves the right to update or modify these Terms at any time without prior notice.
Users are responsible for reviewing updates periodically. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Egypt. Any disputes arising from the use of this platform shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Egyptian courts.
For any inquiries or concerns regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:
